# BuildArk

> We build the tools that carry your business forward.

BuildArk is a boutique web development studio founded by Raz. We build custom websites, apps, and App Store products for small businesses, startups, and growing companies.

## Services

- **Custom Apps**: Tailored applications built to fit your exact business workflow — scheduling systems, internal tools, dashboards, and more.
- **Web Presence**: Landing pages and full websites designed to look credible, load fast, and convert first-time visitors into loyal customers.
- **App Store Products**: Consumer apps published on the App Store, built with the same craft and care we bring to every client project.

## Ideal Client

Small businesses and startups that:
- Need a polished digital presence but lack in-house tech expertise
- Are stuck with outdated workflows and want modern, custom tooling
- Want a hands-on technology partner, not a faceless agency

## Technologies

- Next.js (React)
- Supabase
- Vercel
- TypeScript
- Tailwind CSS

## Contact

- Email: raz@buildark.dev
- Instagram: @buildarksolutions
- Website: https://buildark.dev
- Bookings: https://bookings.buildark.dev
